title: sm capabilities data payload
description: The discovery catalog: slop-mop version, every verb with its output contract, and every registered gate with its metadata. An agent reads this once to learn the entire surface.

schema_version.description: Machine-interface schema version these capabilities describe.

group.description: Coarse grouping for the verb's role in the workflow.

formats.description: Output formats the verb accepts via --format.

exit_codes.description: Map of exit code (as string) to its meaning for this verb.

data_schema.description: $id of the verb's packaged data schema, or null when the verb has not been migrated onto the envelope yet. Fetch the full output schema with `sm schema <verb>`.

name.description: Full gate name in category:check form.

level.description: Lowest verb level that runs this gate.

applicable.description: Whether the gate applies to the current project.

skip_reason.description: Why the gate is not applicable, when applicable is false.
